calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-21-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan. Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Amended Petition on filed February 26, 2003. Proof of service in open court. Petitioner Zahed Sirajullah was sworn and examined.
Court grants name changed to Cole R. Sheridan. Decree signed in open court.
